task_completion.description: Open the draft HR document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) is open, displaying the document 'onboarding_draft.odt' with HR form labels.

task_completion.description: Insert text boxes for 'Full Name' and 'Job Title'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form control text boxes (often shown with a dashed outline or 3D box in design mode) are placed near the 'Full Name' and 'Job Title' labels.

task_completion.description: Insert a date field for 'Start Date'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form control date field (which may have a dropdown arrow for a calendar) is placed near the 'Start Date' label.

task_completion.description: Insert mutually exclusive radio buttons for 'Full-Time' and 'Part-Time'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two radio button controls are placed near 'Full-Time' and 'Part-Time'. The 'Control Properties' dialog may be visible showing the same 'Group name' for both to ensure mutual exclusivity.

task_completion.description: Insert a check box for 'Company Laptop Required?'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A check box form control is placed near the 'Company Laptop Required?' label.

task_completion.description: Save the completed interactive form with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog is visible with the path '/home/ga/Documents/onboarding_form_interactive.odt', or the application title bar is updated to show 'onboarding_form_interactive.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI word processor to insert form controls.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through the Form Controls toolbar or menu in LibreOffice Writer, rather than using terminal scripts to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent inserted actual interactive form controls.
integrity.visual_evidence: The elements inserted are genuine form controls (visible in design mode or with control properties dialogs), not just typed text characters like '[ ]' or '( )' or drawn shapes.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the ODT XML directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open the ODT file as an archive and edit the underlying XML files in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires inserting exactly 2 Text Boxes (Full Name, Job Title), 1 Date Field (Start Date), 2 Radio Buttons (Full-Time/Part-Time with identical Group Name for mutual exclusivity), and 1 Checkbox (Company Laptop Required). The completed form must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/onboarding_form_interactive.odt.
